# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist file types using trusted server-side validation, not just filename extensions.
- Generate server-side filenames and store uploads outside directly executable/public paths when appropriate.
- Apply size limits, content checks, archive safety checks, and image/document processing safeguards.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust only the original filename or extension.
- Do not store uploads in a public/executable path under a user-controlled name.
- Do not allow unlimited file sizes or dangerous archive extraction behavior.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Profile Uploads
Description: Allow users to upload profile pictures and documents securely.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

defined('ABSPATH') or die('No script kiddies please!');

function upu_enqueue_scripts() {
    wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'upu_enqueue_scripts');

function upu_create_upload_directory() {
    $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
    $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
    if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
    }
}
add_action('init', 'upu_create_upload_directory');

function upu_handle_file_upload() {
    if (isset($_POST['upload_file']) && !empty($_FILES['file_to_upload'])) {
        $file = $_FILES['file_to_upload'];
        $allowed_types = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/gif', 'application/pdf', 'application/msword', 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document'];
        $max_file_size = 2 * 1024 * 1024; // 2MB

        if ($file['size'] > $max_file_size) {
            wp_die('File size exceeds the limit.');
        }

        $file_type = mime_content_type($file['tmp_name']);
        if (!in_array($file_type, $allowed_types)) {
            wp_die('Invalid file type.');
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        $filename = uniqid('upload_', true) . '.' . pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
        $target_file = $user_dir . '/' . $filename;

        if (move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $target_file)) {
            echo 'File uploaded successfully: ' . esc_html($filename);
        } else {
            wp_die('File upload failed.');
        }
    }
}

function upu_upload_form() {
    ?>
    <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
        <input type="file" name="file_to_upload" required>
        <input type="submit" name="upload_file" value="Upload">
    </form>
    <?php
}

function upu_add_shortcode() {
    ob_start();
    upu_upload_form();
    upu_handle_file_upload();
    return ob_get_clean();
}
add_shortcode('user_upload', 'upu_add_shortcode');
?>
